_comment: Wang Family Village — Ancestral Hall structure definition. Per PROJECT_MASTER.md §5.1, the ancestral hall is where the village elders speak of 'the lost generation.' Standalone jigsaw structure spawning in ergenverse:zhao_plains biome. Size 6 to allow modest jigsaw expansion (annex, courtyard). NBT composition to be authored in-game; placeholder location references data/ergenverse/structures/wang_family_village/ancestral_hall.nbt.
